title: Slovakian Ham Lasagna in Indian Style
description: A Slovakian twist on a classic Lasagna dish, but with an Indian flavor profile. This unique fusion combines the richness of Slovakia with the spices of India.
instructions: Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the onion, ginger, and garlic. Cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the garam masala, cumin, turmeric, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the ham and cook until heated through.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles, ham mixture, and Slovakian cheese blend.

In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a thin layer of the noodle mixture. Top with a layer of the cheese mixture. Repeat this process until all ingredients are used, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before serving.
